full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #32 (2026-05-15)

PULSE
Health: 0.6145 (B). 934 wallets, 193 contributors. 146 memos yesterday vs 164 avg. Velocity steady.

FLOW
44 reward payments, 344054 PFT distributed to 23 contributors. Top earner: rMA69k...rcQK (125829 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 8,800 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (8,800 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (60,800 PFT, avg 8,686/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rMA69k...rcQK (112 memos). Fastest new contributor: rMA69k...rcQK (37.3 memos/day in 3 days). 24 new wallet(s) this week. 33 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 78.5%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-15): 160 transactions from 25 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
